allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Killing PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } } } else { "Nothing listening on port 3000" })
